scripts.build: npm run main:install && npm run admin:install && npm run frontend:build && npm run admin:frontend:build
scripts.frontend:build: cd frontend && rm -rf dist && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build
scripts.admin:frontend:build: cd admin/frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm run main:install && npm run admin:install
